description: Layer-4 overrides applied AFTER vendors/arduino/platformio. `vid_overrides` and `vidpid_overrides` UNCONDITIONALLY replace earlier names (used for re-attribution where the registered VID owner is not the recognizable consumer brand). `vidpid_board_links` is polyfill-only — its junction rows are inserted with INSERT OR IGNORE so a board whose upstream JSON DOES carry hwids keeps its upstream linkage; the curated rule only fills in for boards where upstream is silent. The headline case is Teensy: PlatformIO ships hwids for teensy40 only, so the curated rule transparently completes the linkage for teensy30/31/35/36/41/LC/2.0/++2.0/MicroMod.

vidpid_board_links.note: PJRC reuses the same runtime PID table across every Teensy variant — the active PID is selected by Arduino IDE's USB-type config, not the chip. See other/teensy_pids.json _provenance for upstream sources (teensy4/usb_desc.h, teensy_loader_cli.c).
NXP IMXRT1062 ROM serial-download bootloader. Only the Teensy 4.x variants carry the IMXRT1062 chip; matching by MCU prefix keeps this stable when new IMXRT-class boards are added.
